fog.example_en: His mind was in a fog after hearing so many complicated instructions at once.
fog.example_zh: 在一次聽到這麼多複雜的指示後，他的頭腦變得迷茫。

follow.example_en: The children followed their teacher through the museum and looked at all the exhibits.
follow.example_zh: 孩子們跟著老師穿過博物館，看了所有的展品。

food.example_en: The restaurant serves delicious Chinese food that many students enjoy eating there.
food.example_zh: 那家餐廳提供許多學生喜歡吃的美味中式食物。

fool.example_en: He felt like a fool after spending money on a broken video game.
fool.example_zh: 在花錢買了一個壞的電玩遊戲後，他覺得自己像個傻瓜。

foolish.example_en: In a heavy storm, swimming in the sea would be foolish.
foolish.example_zh: 在大暴風雨中游泳很愚蠢。

foot.example_en: I hurt my foot while playing basketball yesterday.
foot.example_zh: 我昨天打籃球時傷到了腳。

football.example_en: Many children in Taiwan enjoy playing football after school.
football.example_zh: 台灣很多小孩喜歡放學後踢足球。

for.example_en: My mother bought a beautiful birthday gift for me.
for.example_zh: 我媽媽買了一份漂亮的生日禮物給我。

force.example_en: You should not force children to eat foods they dislike.
force.example_zh: 你不應該強迫小孩吃他們不喜歡的食物。

foreign.example_en: She enjoys learning to cook foreign dishes every weekend.
foreign.example_zh: 她喜歡每個週末學習烹飪外國菜餚。

foreigner.example_en: The foreigner at the restaurant speaks three languages fluently.
foreigner.example_zh: 那家餐廳的外國人會流利地說三種語言。

forest.example_en: Last summer we went hiking deep into the forest.
forest.example_zh: 去年夏天我們進入森林深處去登山。

forget.example_en: She always forgets to bring her homework to school.
forget.example_zh: 她總是忘記帶功課來上學。

forgive.example_en: I hope my friend will forgive me for being late.
forgive.example_zh: 我希望我的朋友能原諒我遲到了。

fork.example_en: She used a fork to eat the salad at dinner.
fork.example_zh: 她用叉子在晚餐時吃沙拉。

form.example_en: Ice will form on the lake when the temperature drops.
form.example_zh: 當溫度下降時，冰會在湖面上形成。

formal.example_en: Students must wear formal clothes for the graduation ceremony.
formal.example_zh: 學生必須穿著正式服裝參加畢業典禮。

former.example_en: My former teacher came to our school to give a lecture.
former.example_zh: 我以前的老師來學校演講。

forty.example_en: My grandfather is forty years older than my youngest brother.
forty.example_zh: 我的祖父比我最小的弟弟大四十歲。

four.example_en: There are four people in my family including my parents.
four.example_zh: 我的家族裡有四個人，包括我的父母。

fourteen.example_en: I became fourteen years old on my birthday last month.
fourteen.example_zh: 我上個月生日時滿十四歲。

fox.example_en: The clever fox found a way to escape from danger.
fox.example_zh: 聰明的狐狸找到了逃離危險的方法。

frank.example_en: He gave me frank advice about my future career plans.
frank.example_zh: 他給了我關於未來職業計畫的坦率建議。

free.example_en: After school I feel free to relax and play.
free.example_zh: 放學後我可以自由地放鬆並玩耍。

freedom.example_en: After finishing her exams, she finally had freedom to pursue her hobbies.
freedom.example_zh: 考試結束後，她終於有自由去追求自己的興趣。

fresh.example_en: The baker sold fresh bread every morning at the local market.
fresh.example_zh: 麵包師傅每天早上在當地市場賣新鮮麵包。

friday.example_en: On Friday, the school always has a special assembly for all students.
friday.example_zh: 星期五時，學校總是為所有學生舉辦特別的集會。

friend.example_en: My best friend and I have known each other since elementary school days.
friend.example_zh: 我最好的朋友和我從小學時代就認識彼此。

friendly.example_en: The new student was very friendly and quickly made many friends.
friendly.example_zh: 那位新同學非常友善，很快就交到許多朋友。

frighten.example_en: The sudden loud noise frightened all the birds away from the tree.
frighten.example_zh: 突然的巨大噪音嚇得樹上所有的鳥都飛走了。

frog.example_en: By the lake, we could hear the frogs singing loudly every night.
frog.example_zh: 在湖邊，我們每晚都能聽到青蛙大聲唱歌。

from.example_en: The train will depart from the central station at seven o'clock.
from.example_zh: 火車將從中央車站在七點出發。

front.example_en: The front door of the house needed fresh paint before winter arrived.
front.example_zh: 房子的前門在冬天到來之前需要重新粉刷。

fruit.example_en: Fresh fruit from the local farm tastes much better than imported ones.
fruit.example_zh: 來自當地農場的新鮮水果味道比進口的好得多。

fry.example_en: Mom likes to fry vegetables with garlic for our family dinner.
fry.example_zh: 媽媽喜歡用大蒜炒菜作為我們的家庭晚餐。

full.example_en: The parking lot was full, so we had to wait for a space.
full.example_zh: 停車場停滿了，所以我們必須等待停車位。

fun.example_en: Playing games with friends is so much fun on weekends.
fun.example_zh: 在週末和朋友一起玩遊戲非常有趣。

function.example_en: The main function of this tool is to cut wood into smaller pieces.
function.example_zh: 這個工具的主要功能是把木頭切成更小的塊。

funny.example_en: My sister told a funny joke that made everyone laugh during lunch.
funny.example_zh: 我妹妹在午餐時說了一個有趣的笑話，讓大家都笑了。

furniture.example_en: The new furniture in our living room makes the space look more modern.
furniture.example_zh: 客廳裡的新傢俱讓整個空間看起來更現代化。

future.example_en: In the future, she hopes to become a successful engineer or scientist.
future.example_zh: 將來，她希望成為一名成功的工程師或科學家。

gain.example_en: By practicing every day, he gradually gained confidence in speaking English.
gain.example_zh: 通過每天練習，他逐漸在說英語時獲得了信心。

game.example_en: The basketball game between two schools was exciting and very close.
game.example_zh: 兩所學校之間的籃球比賽非常激動人心且非常接近。

garage.example_en: My father parks his car in the garage before it gets dark.
garage.example_zh: 我父親在天黑前把車停在車庫裡。

garbage.example_en: Please put the garbage in the bin before we leave for school.
garbage.example_zh: 我們上學前請把垃圾放進垃圾桶。

garden.example_en: My grandmother grows tomatoes and flowers in her garden every summer.
garden.example_zh: 我奶奶每個夏天在她的花園裡種番茄和花。

gas.example_en: The car needs gas, so we need to stop at the station soon.
gas.example_zh: 汽車需要汽油，所以我們很快得在加油站停下。

gate.example_en: The wooden gate at the school entrance opens every morning at eight.
gate.example_zh: 學校入口的木門每天早上八點打開。

gather.example_en: Everyone gathered in the classroom to discuss the school trip plans together.
gather.example_zh: 每個人聚集在教室裡一起討論校外教學的計畫。

general.example_en: In general, students prefer afternoon classes more than early morning ones.
general.example_zh: 一般來說，學生比較喜歡下午的課而不是一大早的課。

generous.example_en: My uncle is generous and always gives helpful advice to everyone around him.
generous.example_zh: 我叔叔很慷慨，總是給周圍的人有幫助的建議。

genius.example_en: The young pianist showed her genius by mastering that difficult composition in weeks.
genius.example_zh: 這位年輕鋼琴家在短短幾週內掌握了那首困難的作品，展現了她的天才。

gentle.example_en: The nurse spoke in a gentle voice to comfort the worried young patient.
gentle.example_zh: 護士用溫柔的聲音對驚慌失措的年輕病人說話以安慰他。

gentleman.example_en: The gentleman in the suit held the door open for all the students.
gentleman.example_zh: 穿著西裝的紳士為所有學生打開門。

geography.example_en: My geography teacher explained how mountains affect the weather in different regions.
geography.example_zh: 我的地理老師解釋了山如何影響不同地區的天氣。

gesture.example_en: She made a friendly gesture by waving her hand to greet me.
gesture.example_zh: 她揮手向我打招呼，做了一個友好的手勢。

get.example_en: If you study hard, you will get good grades on your next exam.
get.example_zh: 如果你努力學習，你會在下次考試中得到好成績。

ghost.example_en: The children played games while telling ghost stories in the dark at night.
ghost.example_zh: 孩子們在夜間黑暗中講鬼故事並玩遊戲。

giant.example_en: The giant tree in the park has been standing there for one hundred years.
giant.example_zh: 公園裡的那棵巨樹已經在那裡站了一百年。

gift.example_en: She received a beautiful gift from her parents on her birthday yesterday.
gift.example_zh: 她昨天從父母那裡收到了一份漂亮的禮物。

girl.example_en: The girl with curly hair sits next to me in English class.
girl.example_zh: 那個捲髮女孩在英文課上坐在我身邊。

give.example_en: My best friend gave me her old bicycle because she wanted a new one.
give.example_zh: 我最好的朋友把她的舊自行車給了我，因為她想要一輛新的。

glad.example_en: I was very glad to see my old friends at the school reunion.
glad.example_zh: 我在校友聚會上看到老朋友時很高興。

glass.example_en: The glass window in our classroom broke during yesterday's strong storm.
glass.example_zh: 我們教室的玻璃窗在昨天的強風暴中破了。

glasses.example_en: My sister wears glasses to see the board clearly in class.
glasses.example_zh: 我妹妹戴眼鏡才能在課堂上清楚看到黑板。

glove.example_en: He put on his leather glove before playing the baseball game.
glove.example_zh: 他在棒球比賽前戴上皮革手套。

glue.example_en: You need some glue to stick the broken pieces of the vase together.
glue.example_zh: 你需要膠水才能把花瓶的碎片黏在一起。

go.example_en: Every morning my father goes to the office by bus.
go.example_zh: 每天早上我爸爸坐公車去辦公室。

goal.example_en: The forward kicked the ball directly at the goal and scored.
goal.example_zh: 前鋒直接把球踢向球門並進球了。

goat.example_en: The farmer keeps several goats in the field behind his house.
goat.example_zh: 農民在他房子後面的田裡養了好幾隻山羊。

god.example_en: In Greek mythology, Zeus is the god of thunder and sky.
god.example_zh: 在希臘神話中，宙斯是雷電和天空之神。

gold.example_en: The jewelry was made of pure gold and cost a lot of money.
gold.example_zh: 這件珠寶是用純金製成的，花了很多錢。

golden.example_en: The sunset painted the whole sky with a beautiful golden color.
golden.example_zh: 夕陽把整片天空染成了漂亮的金黃色。

golf.example_en: My grandfather plays golf every weekend with his friends at the club.
golf.example_zh: 我祖父每個週末都和朋友在高爾夫球俱樂部打高爾夫球。

good.example_en: That was a good movie and everyone enjoyed watching it together.
good.example_zh: 那是一部不錯的電影，大家都很享受一起看。

goodness.example_en: Vegetables are full of goodness and help keep your body healthy.
goodness.example_zh: 蔬菜含有豐富的營養，能幫助你保持身體健康。

goose.example_en: The goose waddled across the pond and made loud honking sounds.
goose.example_zh: 鵝搖搖晃晃地走過池塘，發出很大的嘎嘎聲。

government.example_en: The government announced new rules to protect the environment last month.
government.example_zh: 政府上個月公布了新的環保規則。

grade.example_en: She received a top grade on her history exam because she studied hard.
grade.example_zh: 她因為努力讀書，在歷史考試中獲得了最高成績。

gram.example_en: The recipe says to add exactly fifty grams of sugar to the cake.
gram.example_zh: 食譜說要在蛋糕裡加入正好五十克的糖。

grandfather.example_en: My grandfather tells interesting stories about his life when he was young.
grandfather.example_zh: 我祖父講述他年輕時生活的有趣故事。

grandmother.example_en: Every Sunday my grandmother cooks delicious meals for our whole family.
grandmother.example_zh: 每個星期天我祖母都為全家人做好吃的飯菜。

grandson.example_en: The old man was very happy to meet his new grandson at the hospital.
grandson.example_zh: 老人在醫院見到他的新生孫子，非常高興。

grape.example_en: The children ate fresh grapes from the fruit bowl in the kitchen.
grape.example_zh: 孩子們吃了廚房水果盤裡新鮮的葡萄。

grass.example_en: The sheep eat grass in the field every morning without stopping.
grass.example_zh: 羊每天早上在田裡吃草，似乎永遠停不下來。

gray.example_en: The old man had gray hair and many interesting stories from his past.
gray.example_zh: 這位老人滿頭白髮，有許多關於過去的有趣故事。

great.example_en: The storm caused great damage to many buildings in our village.
great.example_zh: 暴風雨對我們村莊的許多建築物造成了巨大損害。

greedy.example_en: The greedy boy ate all the cookies without sharing them with anyone.
greedy.example_zh: 那個貪吃的男孩吃掉了所有餅乾，沒有和任何人分享。

green.example_en: The green trees and plants made the park look beautiful and peaceful.
green.example_zh: 綠色的樹木和植物使公園看起來美麗又寧靜。

greet.example_en: My grandmother always greets me with a warm smile when I visit.
greet.example_zh: 我去拜訪時，奶奶總是用溫暖的笑容歡迎我。

ground.example_en: The children played games on the ground in the school courtyard.
ground.example_zh: 孩子們在學校操場的地面上玩遊戲。

group.example_en: A group of students went to the museum for a history field trip.
group.example_zh: 一群學生一起去博物館進行歷史校外教學。

grow.example_en: The tomato plants grew very tall during the warm summer months.
grow.example_zh: 番茄植物在溫暖的夏季裡長得非常高。

guard.example_en: The guard at the museum entrance checked everyone's bag very carefully.
guard.example_zh: 博物館入口的警衛非常仔細地檢查了每個人的包包。

guava.example_en: My uncle grows guava trees in his backyard and makes fresh juice.
guava.example_zh: 我叔叔在後院種芭樂樹，並用來製作新鮮果汁。

guess.example_en: I couldn't guess the right answer to the math problem without help.
guess.example_zh: 沒有幫助，我無法猜出那道數學題的正確答案。

guest.example_en: Our guest from Japan brought gifts and shared interesting Tokyo stories.
guest.example_zh: 我們來自日本的客人帶來了禮物，分享了有趣的東京故事。

guide.example_en: The teacher guided us through the forest and taught us about plants.
guide.example_zh: 老師帶著我們穿過森林，教我們了解各種植物。

guitar.example_en: He practiced guitar every day to prepare for the school talent show.
guitar.example_zh: 他每天練習吉他，為學校才藝表演做準備。

gun.example_en: The soldier carried a gun to protect the city during the dangerous night.
gun.example_zh: 士兵在危險的夜晚拿著槍來保護城市。

guy.example_en: The guy next door helped us fix the broken fence with his tools.
guy.example_zh: 隔壁的那個男人用他的工具幫我們修理了破損的柵欄。

gym.example_en: I go to the gym three times a week to stay healthy and strong.
gym.example_zh: 我每週去健身房三次，以保持健康和強壯。

habit.example_en: Reading before bed is a good habit that helps me sleep easily.
habit.example_zh: 睡前閱讀是個好習慣，幫助我輕鬆入睡。

hair.example_en: The wind blew her hair around her face while she walked in park.
hair.example_zh: 當她在公園裡散步時，風吹亂了她臉上的頭髮。

half.example_en: I ate half of my sandwich at lunch.
half.example_zh: 我在午餐時吃了一半的三明治。

hall.example_en: The students walked through the long hall to reach the classroom.
hall.example_zh: 學生們走過長走廊到達教室。

halloween.example_en: Every Halloween, children dress up and go trick-or-treating for candy.
halloween.example_zh: 每個萬聖節，孩子們都會裝扮成鬼怪去要糖果。

ham.example_en: For breakfast, she cooked ham and eggs on the skillet.
ham.example_zh: 早餐時，她在平底鍋上煎火腿和雞蛋。

hamburger.example_en: The restaurant makes delicious hamburgers with fresh vegetables and beef.
hamburger.example_zh: 這家餐廳製作的漢堡包有新鮮蔬菜和牛肉。

hammer.example_en: He used a hammer to nail the picture frame to the wall.
hammer.example_zh: 他用鎚子把相框釘在牆上。

hand.example_en: The hour hand on the clock pointed to twelve o'clock.
hand.example_zh: 時鐘上的時針指向十二點。

handkerchief.example_en: She pulled out a handkerchief from her pocket to wipe her tears.
handkerchief.example_zh: 她從口袋裡拿出手帕擦眼淚。

handle.example_en: The drawer has a metal handle that is easy to grip.
handle.example_zh: 抽屜有一個容易握住的金屬把手。

handsome.example_en: The handsome actor wore a dark suit to the movie premiere.
handsome.example_zh: 那位英俊的演員在電影首映式上穿著深色套裝。

hang.example_en: She decided to hang the new painting above the sofa.
hang.example_zh: 她決定把新畫掛在沙發上方。

hanger.example_en: She put her wet coat on a hanger to dry overnight.
hanger.example_zh: 她把濕衣服掛在衣架上晾乾。

happen.example_en: Two interesting things happened during the school assembly this morning.
happen.example_zh: 今早學校集會期間發生了兩件有趣的事。

happy.example_en: The happy child laughed and played with friends at the park.
happy.example_zh: 那個快樂的孩子在公園裡和朋友們一起笑著玩。

hard.example_en: The diamond is so hard that almost nothing can scratch it.
hard.example_zh: 鑽石非常堅硬，幾乎沒有什麼能刮傷它。

hardly.example_en: She hardly ever stays up past ten o'clock on school nights.
hardly.example_zh: 在上學的日子，她幾乎不會熬夜到十點以後。

hat.example_en: He wore a black hat to protect his head from the sun.
hat.example_zh: 他戴著黑帽子保護頭部免受陽光照射。

hate.example_en: She hates getting up early in the morning before school.
hate.example_zh: 她討厭在上學前一大早就起床。

have.example_en: I have already finished my homework for tomorrow's class.
have.example_zh: 我已經完成了明天課堂的功課。

head.example_en: The student bumped her head on the door when running.
head.example_zh: 學生跑步時把頭撞到門上。

headache.example_en: I had a terrible headache yesterday after studying for three hours straight.
headache.example_zh: 我昨天連續讀書三小時後，頭痛得很厲害。

health.example_en: Regular exercise is important for maintaining your overall health and fitness.
health.example_zh: 定期運動對保持整體健康和身體狀態很重要。

healthy.example_en: My grandmother is seventy years old but still very healthy and energetic.
healthy.example_zh: 我奶奶七十歲了，但仍然非常健康又有活力。

hear.example_en: I could hear the rain falling heavily against the classroom windows today.
hear.example_zh: 我能聽見雨水重重敲打教室窗戶的聲音。

heart.example_en: The doctor listened to my heart with a stethoscope during the check-up.
heart.example_zh: 醫生在檢查時用聽診器聽我的心跳。

heat.example_en: The intense heat in July made everyone stay indoors with the air conditioning.
heat.example_zh: 七月的高溫讓大家都待在冷氣房裡。

heater.example_en: My room gets very cold in winter, so I turn on the heater at night.
heater.example_zh: 我的房間在冬天會很冷，所以我晚上會打開暖爐。

heavy.example_en: This box is too heavy for me to carry upstairs by myself right now.
heavy.example_zh: 這個箱子太重了，我無法自己扛上樓。

height.example_en: The tallest building in our city has a height of over three hundred meters.
height.example_zh: 我們城市最高的建築物高度超過三百公尺。

helicopter.example_en: The news helicopter flew above the city to record the major traffic accident.
helicopter.example_zh: 新聞直升機在城市上空飛行，錄製這起重大交通事故。

help.example_en: I need some help moving this furniture into the living room tomorrow afternoon.
help.example_zh: 我明天下午需要一些幫忙來搬這些傢俱進客廳。

helpful.example_en: My older brother was very helpful when I needed advice about choosing my subjects.
helpful.example_zh: 當我需要關於選科的建議時，我哥哥很樂意幫忙。

hen.example_en: The farmer's red hen laid eggs in the barn every single morning without fail.
hen.example_zh: 農夫的紅母雞每天早上都在穀倉裡下蛋。

here.example_en: Come here and sit down so we can discuss the school project together.
here.example_zh: 過來坐下，我們可以一起討論這個學校項目。

hero.example_en: That firefighter became a hero after rescuing the family from the burning house.
hero.example_zh: 那位消防員在從燃燒的房子裡救出家人後成了英雄。

hide.example_en: The children played hide and seek in the park, hiding behind trees and bushes.
hide.example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡玩躲貓貓，躲在樹和灌木叢後面。

high.example_en: The ceiling in our school gym is so high that the sound echoes everywhere.
high.example_zh: 我們學校體育館的天花板很高，聲音到處迴響。

highway.example_en: The new highway connecting our town to the capital will open next summer.
highway.example_zh: 連接我們小鎮和首都的新公路將在明年夏天開放。

hike.example_en: Our family went on a difficult hike up the mountain last weekend with friends.
hike.example_zh: 上週末我們一家人和朋友一起登山進行了艱難的遠足。

hill.example_en: My friend lives on top of a green hill with a nice view of the valley.
hill.example_zh: 我的朋友住在一座綠色小山的頂端，可以看到山谷的美景。

hip.example_en: She felt sore in her hip after running for two hours yesterday.
hip.example_zh: 她昨天跑了兩小時後感到髖部酸痛。

hippo.example_en: The hippo stayed in the water most of the day at the zoo.
hippo.example_zh: 在動物園裡，河馬大部分時間待在水中。

hire.example_en: We need to hire a bus for the school trip next month.
hire.example_zh: 我們需要為下月的校外教學租一輛巴士。

history.example_en: My brother loves history and always reads books about ancient China.
history.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡歷史，總是閱讀關於古代中國的書籍。

hit.example_en: The baseball player hit the ball very far into the field.
hit.example_zh: 棒球選手把球打得很遠進入球場。

hobby.example_en: Photography is her favorite hobby and she takes pictures almost every day.
hobby.example_zh: 攝影是她最喜歡的嗜好，她幾乎每天都在拍照。

hold.example_en: The child held her mother's hand tightly while crossing the street.
hold.example_zh: 小孩在過馬路時緊緊握住媽媽的手。

hole.example_en: There is a hole in my sock so I need to buy new ones.
hole.example_zh: 我的襪子上有一個洞，所以我需要買新的。

holiday.example_en: We are going to visit my grandmother's house during the summer holiday.
holiday.example_zh: 暑假期間我們要去拜訪奶奶的家。

home.example_en: After school, he usually goes straight home to do his homework.
home.example_zh: 放學後，他通常直接回家做功課。

homework.example_en: I have to finish my homework before I can play video games tonight.
homework.example_zh: 我必須在今晚玩電動前完成功課。

honest.example_en: She gave an honest answer about her mistake instead of making excuses.
honest.example_zh: 她對自己的錯誤給出誠實的回答，而不是找藉口。

honesty.example_en: Teachers always appreciate honesty when students admit they did something wrong.
honesty.example_zh: 當學生承認做錯事時，老師總是讚賞他們的誠實。

honey.example_en: She put honey in her tea because she likes it sweet and warm.
honey.example_zh: 她在茶裡加蜂蜜，因為她喜歡喝甜的熱飲。

hop.example_en: Each hop brought the child closer to the finish line of the race.
hop.example_zh: 每一個單腳跳都讓小孩更接近比賽的終點線。

hope.example_en: She still has hope that her lost cat will return home someday.
hope.example_zh: 她仍然抱著希望，相信她遺失的貓咪有一天會回家。

horrible.example_en: The weather was horrible yesterday so we couldn't go to the park.
horrible.example_zh: 昨天的天氣很糟糕，所以我們無法去公園。

horse.example_en: The girl rode a horse on the beach during her summer vacation.
horse.example_zh: 女孩在暑假期間在海灘上騎馬。

hospital.example_en: My father went to the hospital for a check-up and everything looks fine.
hospital.example_zh: 我父親去醫院檢查，一切看起來都很好。

host.example_en: The host welcomed all the guests at the door with warm smiles.
host.example_zh: 主人在門口以溫暖的笑容歡迎所有客人。

hot.example_en: Be careful not to touch the cup because the coffee is still very hot.
hot.example_zh: 小心不要碰那個杯子，因為咖啡仍然很燙。

hotel.example_en: We stayed in a nice hotel near the beach during our vacation last summer.
hotel.example_zh: 去年夏天我們在海邊附近的一家不錯的飯店住了幾天。

hour.example_en: The movie is two hours long, so we should leave home a bit earlier.
hour.example_zh: 這部電影長達兩個小時，所以我們應該早一點出門。

house.example_en: My grandmother's old house sits on a quiet hill surrounded by trees.
house.example_zh: 我祖母的老房子坐落在一座被樹木環繞的安靜山丘上。

housewife.example_en: My mother works as a housewife and takes care of our family.
housewife.example_zh: 我母親是家庭主婦，照顧我們一家人。

housework.example_en: My sister helps with housework by washing dishes and doing laundry every week.
housework.example_zh: 我妹妹每週洗碗和做洗衣等家務來幫忙。

how.example_en: She asked him how he managed to finish his homework so quickly.
how.example_zh: 她問他怎樣那麼快就完成了功課。

however.example_en: The weather was bad; however, we still decided to go for a bike ride.
however.example_zh: 天氣很糟；不過，我們仍然決定去騎自行車。

huge.example_en: The new shopping mall in our city is so huge that it took us hours to explore.
huge.example_zh: 我們城市新開的購物中心非常龐大，我們花了好幾個小時才逛完。

human.example_en: Dogs have better hearing than humans, so loud noises can hurt their ears.
human.example_zh: 狗的聽覺比人類更靈敏，所以大聲的噪音會傷害牠們的耳朵。

humble.example_en: Despite his success, the coach remained humble and always credited his team.
humble.example_zh: 儘管成功，教練仍然謙虛，總是歸功於他的團隊。

humid.example_en: During summer in Taiwan, the weather becomes very humid and uncomfortable to be outside.
humid.example_zh: 台灣的夏天天氣非常潮濕，在室外會感到不舒服。

humor.example_en: My friend's sense of humor makes everyone laugh during our boring classroom breaks.
humor.example_zh: 我朋友的幽默感讓所有人在無聊的課間休息時都笑了起來。

humorous.example_en: The teacher told a humorous story to make the class more interested in the lesson.
humorous.example_zh: 老師講了一個有趣的故事來使全班對課程更感興趣。

hundred.example_en: The charity event raised over five hundred dollars for the local children's hospital.
hundred.example_zh: 這場慈善活動為當地兒童醫院籌集了超過五百美元。

hunger.example_en: After playing sports for two hours, she felt a strong hunger and needed food.
hunger.example_zh: 運動了兩個小時後，她感到強烈的飢餓，需要吃東西。

hungry.example_en: We were so hungry after our long hike that we ate everything in our lunch box.
hungry.example_zh: 長途登山後我們餓得不行，把午餐盒裡的東西都吃了。

hunt.example_en: In the winter, some animals hunt for food because resources become very scarce.
hunt.example_zh: 冬天時，某些動物為食物而狩獵，因為資源變得非常稀缺。

hunter.example_en: The experienced hunter tracked the deer through the forest with his trained dog.
hunter.example_zh: 經驗豐富的獵人用他訓練有素的狗在森林裡追蹤鹿。

hurry.example_en: Please hurry up or we will be late for the movie that starts at seven.
hurry.example_zh: 請快點，否則我們會遲到看七點開始的電影。

hurt.example_en: My knee hurts when I run too fast on the basketball court.
hurt.example_zh: 我在籃球場上跑太快時膝蓋會疼痛。

husband.example_en: My mother's husband helps her with cooking every evening.
husband.example_zh: 我媽媽的丈夫每晚都幫她做菜。

ice.example_en: The water froze into thick ice on the frozen lake.
ice.example_zh: 水在結冰的湖上凍成了厚冰。

idea.example_en: She had a great idea for our school's art competition project.
idea.example_zh: 她對我們學校藝術比賽項目有個絕妙的想法。

if.example_en: If you study hard now, you will pass the exam easily.
if.example_zh: 如果你現在認真讀書，考試會很容易及格。

ignore.example_en: He ignored his friend's text message and continued playing video games.
ignore.example_zh: 他沒有理睬朋友的簡訊，繼續玩電玩遊戲。

ill.example_en: My grandmother felt ill this morning and stayed in bed all day.
ill.example_zh: 我奶奶今早感覺不舒服，整天都躺在床上。

imagine.example_en: Can you imagine what our town will look like in fifty years?
imagine.example_zh: 你能想像我們的城鎮在五十年後會是什麼樣子嗎？

impolite.example_en: It was impolite of him to interrupt the teacher while she was talking.
impolite.example_zh: 他在老師說話時打斷她是很不禮貌的。

importance.example_en: Everyone understands the importance of exercise for physical health.
importance.example_zh: 每個人都明白運動對身體健康的重要性。

important.example_en: Getting enough sleep is important for your concentration in class.
important.example_zh: 充足的睡眠對你在課堂上的注意力很重要。

impossible.example_en: It's impossible to finish this homework in just thirty minutes.
impossible.example_zh: 不可能在短短三十分鐘內完成這份作業。

improve.example_en: His English improved significantly after studying with a native speaker.
improve.example_zh: 在和母語人士一起學習後，他的英文進步很大。

in.example_en: There are many books in the school library that you can borrow.
in.example_zh: 學校圖書館裡有許多書你可以借。

inch.example_en: He is about six inches taller than his younger brother now.
inch.example_zh: 他現在比他的弟弟高約六英寸。

include.example_en: The ticket price includes entrance fee and lunch for everyone.
include.example_zh: 票價包括所有人的入場費和午餐。

income.example_en: Her monthly income from the shop helps pay for her family's living.
income.example_zh: 她從店裡的月收入幫助支付她家的生活費。

increase.example_en: The population of our city has increased dramatically over the years.
increase.example_zh: 我們城市的人口多年來大幅增加。

independent.example_en: As teenagers, we should become more independent and responsible.
independent.example_zh: 作為青少年，我們應該變得更獨立和負責。

indicate.example_en: The red light indicates that you must stop immediately at the corner.
indicate.example_zh: 紅燈表示你必須立即在角落停下來。

influence.example_en: Your parents have a strong influence on your decisions and future goals.
influence.example_zh: 你的父母對你的決定和未來目標有很大的影響。

information.example_en: The teacher asked us to find information about ancient Greece for the project.
information.example_zh: 老師要求我們為這個專案找關於古希臘的資料。

ink.example_en: His pen ran out of ink during the important exam this morning.
ink.example_zh: 他的筆在今早的重要考試中用完了墨水。

insect.example_en: A small insect crawled across the table while we were eating lunch.
insect.example_zh: 我們吃午餐時，一隻小昆蟲在桌子上爬過。

inside.example_en: We waited outside for the bus, then went inside the station to stay warm.
inside.example_zh: 我們在外面等公車，然後進到車站裡面保暖。

insist.example_en: She insists that she didn't break the vase even though we all saw it.
insist.example_zh: 儘管我們都看到了，她還是堅持說她沒有打破花瓶。

inspire.example_en: The coach's speech inspired the team to play their best game ever.
inspire.example_zh: 教練的演講激勵了球隊踢出有史以來最好的比賽。

instance.example_en: One instance of his kindness was buying lunch for a homeless person.
instance.example_zh: 他買午餐給無家可歸的人是他善良的一個例子。

instant.example_en: When she saw the snake, her instant reaction was to scream and run away.
instant.example_zh: 當她看到蛇時，她立刻的反應是尖叫並跑開。

instrument.example_en: She plays the violin, but her favorite instrument is actually the piano.
instrument.example_zh: 她彈小提琴，但她最喜歡的樂器其實是鋼琴。

intelligent.example_en: That intelligent dog can understand over fifty different commands from his owner.
intelligent.example_zh: 那隻聰明的狗能理解主人超過五十個不同的命令。

interest.example_en: She has a growing interest in photography since she got her first camera.
interest.example_zh: 自從她買了第一台相機，她對攝影的興趣逐漸增長。

interested.example_en: Are you interested in joining the school's debate club next semester?
interested.example_zh: 你有興趣下學期加入學校的辯論社嗎？

interesting.example_en: That documentary about space exploration is really interesting and educational.
interesting.example_zh: 那部關於太空探索的紀錄片真的很有趣又有教育意義。

international.example_en: The international food festival brought students from countries around the world.
international.example_zh: 國際美食節吸引了來自世界各地的學生。

internet.example_en: The internet connection was so slow that she couldn't watch the video.
internet.example_zh: 網際網路連線太慢，她無法觀看那個視頻。

interrupt.example_en: Please don't interrupt me while I'm explaining the chemistry problem, okay?
interrupt.example_zh: 我在解釋化學問題的時候，請不要打斷我，好嗎？

interview.example_en: His interview for the summer job went well, and they offered him the position.
interview.example_zh: 他暑期工作的面試進展順利，他們給了他這個職位。

into.example_en: He jumped into the pool without thinking and got his clothes soaking wet.
into.example_zh: 他沒有思考就跳進游泳池，衣服全都濕透了。

introduce.example_en: The school decided to introduce a new computer lab for the students.
introduce.example_zh: 學校決定為學生引進一個新的電腦室。

invent.example_en: The engineer invented a new type of battery that lasts much longer.
invent.example_zh: 工程師發明了一種能用得更久的新型電池。

invitation.example_en: She received an invitation to her friend's birthday party next Saturday.
invitation.example_zh: 她收到了朋友下週六生日派對的邀請。

invite.example_en: My parents invited my best friend to come camping with us this summer.
invite.example_zh: 我的父母邀請我最好的朋友今年夏天和我們一起去露營。

iron.example_en: My mother used an iron to make my school uniform look neat and clean.
iron.example_zh: 我媽媽用熨斗把我的校服燙得整潔乾淨。

island.example_en: The small island off the coast had white sandy beaches and tropical plants.
island.example_zh: 海邊的小島有著白色沙灘和熱帶植物。

item.example_en: Each item on the shopping list costs different amounts at the supermarket.
item.example_zh: 購物清單上的每一項在超市的價格都不同。

jacket.example_en: He wore a warm winter jacket to protect himself from the cold wind.
jacket.example_zh: 他穿著厚重的冬季夾克來抵擋寒風。

jam.example_en: I spread strawberry jam on my toast every morning for a sweet breakfast.
jam.example_zh: 我每天早上在吐司上塗上草莓果醬，享受甜蜜的早餐。

january.example_en: January is the coldest month of the year in the northern regions.
january.example_zh: 一月是北方地區一年中最寒冷的月份。

jazz.example_en: My uncle plays saxophone in a jazz band that performs at the weekend.
jazz.example_zh: 我的叔叔在周末表演的爵士樂樂隊中吹薩克斯風。

jealous.example_en: She felt jealous when her friend won the art competition instead of her.
jealous.example_zh: 當她的朋友而不是她贏得美術競賽時，她感到嫉妒。

jeans.example_en: Most teenagers wear jeans and t-shirts to school because they are comfortable.
jeans.example_zh: 大多數青少年穿著牛仔褲和T恤去上學，因為很舒服。

jeep.example_en: The military jeep drove through the rough mountain roads without any problems.
jeep.example_zh: 軍用吉普車在崎嶇的山路上順利通過。

job.example_en: After graduating from university, she found a job at a technology company.
job.example_zh: 大學畢業後，她在一家科技公司找到了一份工作。

jog.example_en: Every morning before school, he jogs around the park to stay healthy.
jog.example_zh: 上學前每天早晨，他在公園裡慢跑來保持健康。

join.example_en: You can join these two strings together to make one long rope for climbing.
join.example_zh: 你可以把這兩根繩子接在一起，做成一條很長的爬繩。

joke.example_en: My teacher told us a funny joke that made the whole class laugh loudly.
joke.example_zh: 我的老師給我們講了一個有趣的笑話，全班都大笑。

journalist.example_en: The journalist interviewed many people to gather information for the newspaper article.
journalist.example_zh: 記者採訪了許多人，為報紙文章收集資訊。

joy.example_en: The joy on the children's faces showed their excitement about the field trip.
joy.example_zh: 孩子們臉上的喜悅表現出他們對郊遊的興奮。

judge.example_en: Don't judge someone by their appearance before you know their true character.
judge.example_zh: 在了解別人的真實品格之前，不要以貌取人。

juice.example_en: Every morning, she drinks a glass of orange juice before going to school.
juice.example_zh: 她每天早上都在上學前喝一杯柳橙汁。

july.example_en: We always go to the beach with our family in July for summer vacation.
july.example_zh: 我們每年七月都和家人去海邊度暑假。

jump.example_en: The children were jumping on the trampoline and laughing happily in the park.
jump.example_zh: 孩子們在公園裡跳跳床，開心地笑著。

june.example_en: My birthday is in June, so we usually celebrate with ice cream and cake.
june.example_zh: 我的生日在六月，所以我們通常用冰淇淋和蛋糕慶祝。

just.example_en: I just finished my homework, so now I can play video games for an hour.
just.example_zh: 我剛才完成了功課，所以現在可以玩電動一個小時。

keep.example_en: She keeps all her favorite books on a shelf in her bedroom.
keep.example_zh: 她把所有最喜歡的書都放在臥室的書架上。

ketchup.example_en: I like to put ketchup on my french fries and hamburgers at lunch.
ketchup.example_zh: 我喜歡在午餐時在薯條和漢堡上放番茄醬。

key.example_en: My father always carries his house key in his pocket when he leaves home.
key.example_zh: 我爸爸離家時總是把家裡的鑰匙放在口袋裡。

kick.example_en: During soccer practice, the coach taught us how to kick the ball accurately.
kick.example_zh: 足球練習期間，教練教我們如何準確地踢足球。

kid.example_en: The kindergarten kids were playing with toys and building blocks in the classroom.
kid.example_zh: 幼兒園的小孩們在教室裡玩玩具和積木。

kill.example_en: The farmer sprayed pesticide to kill the insects that were destroying his crops.
kill.example_zh: 農民噴灑農藥來消滅正在毀壞他農作物的昆蟲。

kilogram.example_en: The recipe says we need two kilograms of flour to make this big birthday cake.
kilogram.example_zh: 食譜說我們需要兩公斤的麵粉來做這個大生日蛋糕。

kilometer.example_en: It is about five kilometers from my house to the nearest train station.
kilometer.example_zh: 從我家到最近的火車站大約五公里遠。

kind.example_en: My teacher is very kind and always helps students who have problems with homework.
kind.example_zh: 我的老師很仁慈，總是幫助那些功課有問題的學生。

kindergarten.example_en: When I was in kindergarten, I made many friends and learned to share toys.
kindergarten.example_zh: 當我上幼兒園時，我交了很多朋友，學會了分享玩具。

king.example_en: In the fairy tale, the kind king ruled his kingdom fairly and justly.
king.example_zh: 在童話裡，仁慈的國王公正地統治他的王國。

kingdom.example_en: The history teacher told us stories about ancient kingdoms and their powerful rulers.
kingdom.example_zh: 歷史老師給我們講了關於古代王國及其強大統治者的故事。

kiss.example_en: In the movie, the prince gave the sleeping princess a kiss to wake her up.
kiss.example_zh: 在電影裡，王子吻了睡著的公主來喚醒她。

kitchen.example_en: My mother spends a lot of time cooking in the kitchen every evening.
kitchen.example_zh: 我媽媽每天晚上都花很多時間在廚房裡做飯。

kite.example_en: On the windy day, we flew our colorful kite high above the beach and fields.
kite.example_zh: 在有風的那天，我們把彩色風箏放得很高，在海灘和田野上方飛翔。

kitten.example_en: My sister's new kitten is very playful and likes to chase toy balls.
kitten.example_zh: 我妹妹的小貓很愛玩，喜歡追逐玩具球。

knee.example_en: When he fell off his bicycle, he scraped his knee on the road pretty badly.
knee.example_zh: 當他從腳踏車上摔下來時，他的膝蓋在路上擦傷得很厲害。

knife.example_en: Use a knife carefully when cutting bread because it is very sharp.
knife.example_zh: 用刀切麵包時要小心，因為刀很銳利。

knock.example_en: Please knock on the door loudly before you enter my office tomorrow morning.
knock.example_zh: 明天上午進我辦公室前，請先大聲敲門。

know.example_en: My best friend knows all my secrets because I trust him with everything.
know.example_zh: 我最好的朋友知道我所有的秘密，因為我信任他。

knowledge.example_en: Having good knowledge of English grammar will help you pass the national exam next year.
knowledge.example_zh: 對英文文法有良好的認識能幫助你通過明年的國家考試。

lack.example_en: The team lacks experienced players, so they lost most of their games this season.
lack.example_zh: 球隊缺乏經驗豐富的球員，所以本賽季輸掉了大部分比賽。

lady.example_en: A beautiful lady in a red dress walked into the restaurant yesterday evening.
lady.example_zh: 一位穿著紅裙子的美麗女士昨晚走進餐廳。

lake.example_en: My family enjoys taking a boat trip on the beautiful lake near our house.
lake.example_zh: 我的家人喜歡在我們家附近的美麗湖上乘船遊玩。

lamb.example_en: The farmer was happy to see his lamb growing strong and healthy there.
lamb.example_zh: 農夫很高興看到他的小羊在牧場上強壯健康地成長。

lamp.example_en: She turned on the lamp in her bedroom so she could read her book comfortably.
lamp.example_zh: 她打開臥室的燈，這樣就可以舒適地讀她的書。

land.example_en: The airplane finally touched down on the land after flying through the storm.
land.example_zh: 飛機在經過風暴後終於降落在陸地上。

language.example_en: Learning a new language like Japanese can be difficult but also very interesting and rewarding.
language.example_zh: 學習新的語言如日語可能很困難，但也很有趣且令人滿足。

lantern.example_en: During the Mid-Autumn Festival, children carry colorful lanterns and walk through the streets happily.
lantern.example_zh: 在中秋節期間，孩子們提著五彩繽紛的燈籠在街上快樂地行走。

large.example_en: The large shopping mall in the city center has over two hundred stores and restaurants.
large.example_zh: 市中心的大型購物中心有超過兩百間商店和餐廳。

last.example_en: The last bus to the station leaves at eleven o'clock, so let's hurry.
last.example_zh: 最後一班前往車站的公車在十一點離開，所以我們要趕快。

late.example_en: The late autumn weather is getting colder every day, so I need warmer clothes soon.
late.example_zh: 晚秋的天氣每天都變冷，所以我很快就需要更暖和的衣服。

later.example_en: She said she would call me later tonight after she finishes her homework.
later.example_zh: 她說她今晚做完功課後會稍後打電話給我。

latest.example_en: My cousin loves wearing the latest fashion styles from Korea and always looks very fashionable.
latest.example_zh: 我表妹喜歡穿著來自韓國的最新時尚風格，看起來總是很時尚。

laugh.example_en: His loud laugh made everyone in the room smile and feel happy.
laugh.example_zh: 他的大聲笑聲讓房間裡的每個人都微笑和感到快樂。

law.example_en: Everyone in this country must follow the law or face punishment.
law.example_zh: 這個國家裡，每個人都必須遵守法律，否則會受到懲罰。

lawyer.example_en: My uncle is a lawyer who helps people solve their legal problems.
lawyer.example_zh: 我叔叔是律師，他幫助人們解決法律問題。

lay.example_en: She laid the plates carefully on the table before dinner started.
lay.example_zh: 晚餐前，她小心地把盤子放在桌子上。

lazy.example_en: He felt lazy on Sunday morning and didn't want to wake up.
lazy.example_zh: 星期天早上他感到很懶，不想起床。

lead.example_en: The captain will lead the team to victory in the final game.
lead.example_zh: 隊長將帶領球隊在決賽中贏得勝利。

leader.example_en: The club's leader organized the group project and assigned tasks fairly.
leader.example_zh: 俱樂部的領導人組織了小組專案，並公平地分配任務。

leaf.example_en: A single green leaf fell from the tall tree onto the ground.
leaf.example_zh: 一片綠色的樹葉從高大的樹上落到地面上。

learn.example_en: Children learn new things every day at school and from their families.
learn.example_zh: 孩子們每天在學校和家裡學習新東西。

least.example_en: Of all the students, she studied the least but still passed the test.
least.example_zh: 在所有學生中，她讀得最少，但仍然通過了考試。

leave.example_en: She will leave home tomorrow morning to visit her grandmother in another city.
leave.example_zh: 她明天早上將離開家去另一個城市看望她的祖母。

left.example_en: Turn left at the traffic light and you will find the library there.
left.example_zh: 在紅綠燈處向左轉，你就會找到圖書館。

leg.example_en: After running a marathon, his legs felt sore and tired for days.
leg.example_zh: 跑完馬拉松後，他的腿感到酸痛和疲憊好幾天。

legal.example_en: You must be eighteen years old to reach the legal age for voting.
legal.example_zh: 你必須滿十八歲才能達到合法投票年齡。

lemon.example_en: The waiter added fresh lemon juice to make the water taste better.
lemon.example_zh: 侍者加入新鮮檸檬汁使水味道更好。

lend.example_en: Can you lend me your pen for a moment during the exam?
lend.example_zh: 考試期間，你能借我一支筆嗎？

less.example_en: This restaurant has less food than that one, but it tastes much better.
less.example_zh: 這家餐廳的食物比那家少，但味道好得多。

lesson.example_en: Our English lesson today covered new vocabulary about animals and nature.
lesson.example_zh: 我們今天的英語課涵蓋了關於動物和自然的新詞彙。

let.example_en: Her parents let her go to the concert if she finishes her homework.
let.example_zh: 如果她完成作業，父母會讓她去參加音樂會。

letter.example_en: She wrote a long letter to her friend and mailed it yesterday.
letter.example_zh: 她給朋友寫了一封長信，昨天寄出去了。

lettuce.example_en: Fresh lettuce from the market makes the salad crisp and delicious.
lettuce.example_zh: 來自市場的新鮮生菜使沙拉爽脆美味。

level.example_en: The water level in the pool rises when it rains heavily.
level.example_zh: 下大雨時，池子裡的水位會上升。

library.example_en: I go to the library after school to study and read books.
library.example_zh: 我放學後去圖書館讀書和學習。

lick.example_en: The dog licked its owner's face happily when he came home.
lick.example_zh: 當主人回家時，狗高興地舔著他的臉。

lid.example_en: She put a lid on the pot to keep the food warm.
lid.example_zh: 她在鍋上蓋上蓋子以保持食物溫熱。

lie.example_en: After a long day, he wanted to lie down and rest for a while.
lie.example_zh: 經過漫長的一天後，他想躺下來休息一會兒。

life.example_en: She lived a happy life with her family in a small town.
life.example_zh: 她和家人在小鎮上過著幸福的生活。

lift.example_en: He lifted the heavy box and carried it to the storage room.
lift.example_zh: 他舉起沉重的箱子，把它搬到儲藏室。

light.example_en: Turn on the light because it is too dark to read the book now.
light.example_zh: 開燈吧，因為現在太黑了，看不清楚書。

lightning.example_en: The bright lightning flashed across the sky during the terrible storm.
lightning.example_zh: 可怕的暴風雨中，明亮的閃電在天空中閃過。

like.example_en: Most students like playing sports and games after school every day.
like.example_zh: 大多數學生喜歡每天放學後玩運動和遊戲。

likely.example_en: It will likely rain tomorrow, so remember to bring an umbrella.
likely.example_zh: 明天很可能會下雨，所以記得帶傘。

lily.example_en: The white lily flowers in her garden are beautiful and smell nice.
lily.example_zh: 她花園裡的白百合花很美麗，聞起來也很香。

limit.example_en: There is a speed limit of eighty kilometers per hour on this road.
limit.example_zh: 這條路上的最高速度限制是每小時八十公里。

line.example_en: She drew a straight line on the paper using a ruler and pencil.
line.example_zh: 她用尺子和鉛筆在紙上畫了一條直線。

link.example_en: There is a strong link between good sleep and better school performance.
link.example_zh: 充足睡眠和學校表現之間有著密切的關聯。

lion.example_en: The lion roared loudly in the zoo while visitors watched from behind glass.
lion.example_zh: 獅子在動物園裡大聲咆哮，遊客從玻璃後面觀看。

lip.example_en: She applied red lipstick to her lips before going to the party.
lip.example_zh: 她在去派對前在嘴唇上塗了紅唇膏。

liquid.example_en: Pour the clear liquid into the glass carefully and slowly from the bottle.
liquid.example_zh: 小心地從瓶子裡緩慢地將透明液體倒入玻璃杯。

list.example_en: Please list all the items you need to bring to the camping trip.
list.example_zh: 請列出你需要帶到露營旅行的所有物品。

listen.example_en: You should listen carefully to your teacher's instructions in class every day.
listen.example_zh: 你應該每天在課堂上仔細傾聽老師的指導。

liter.example_en: One liter of water weighs about one kilogram.
liter.example_zh: 一公升的水大約重一公斤。

little.example_en: She ate only a little bit of chocolate before dinner.
little.example_zh: 她晚餐前只吃了一點點巧克力。

live.example_en: Polar bears live in the coldest regions of the Arctic.
live.example_zh: 北極熊生活在北極最寒冷的地區。

loaf.example_en: Mom bought a fresh loaf of bread at the bakery.
loaf.example_zh: 媽媽在麵包店買了一條新鮮的麵包。

local.example_en: We prefer to eat at local restaurants rather than chains.
local.example_zh: 我們喜歡在當地餐廳吃飯，而不是連鎖店。

lock.example_en: Please remember to turn the lock before you leave.

locker.example_en: I put my gym clothes inside my school locker carefully.
locker.example_zh: 我把體育課的衣服小心地放進我的置物櫃裡。

lonely.example_en: After his friends moved away, he felt quite lonely.
lonely.example_zh: 在他的朋友搬走後，他感到相當孤獨。

long.example_en: She has longed to visit Paris ever since childhood.
long.example_zh: 她從小就渴望去巴黎旅遊。

look.example_en: Please look at the whiteboard while I explain the math.
look.example_zh: 我解釋數學時，請看著白板。

lose.example_en: I usually lose my keys because I'm very careless.
lose.example_zh: 因為我很粗心，所以經常丟失鑰匙。

loser.example_en: The loser of the competition will receive a small prize.
loser.example_zh: 比賽的輸者也會獲得一個小獎品。

lot.example_en: I love basketball a lot and play it every day.
lot.example_zh: 我非常熱愛籃球，每天都在打。

loud.example_en: The fireworks were so loud that everyone covered their ears.
loud.example_zh: 煙火聲非常大聲，每個人都捂住了耳朵。

love.example_en: Her love for her family is shown through her actions.
love.example_zh: 她對家人的愛體現在她的行為中。

lovely.example_en: We had a lovely time at the beach yesterday.
lovely.example_zh: 我們昨天在海灘度過了愉快的時光。

lover.example_en: The movie tells a story about two young lovers in Paris.
lover.example_zh: 這部電影講述了兩個年輕戀人在巴黎的故事。

low.example_en: The bridge is too low for tall trucks to pass.
low.example_zh: 這座橋太低了，高車輛無法通過。

luck.example_en: It was pure luck that she found her lost wallet.
luck.example_zh: 她找到遺失的錢包純粹是運氣。

lucky.example_en: I was lucky enough to win the first prize.
lucky.example_zh: 我很幸運贏得了一等獎。

lunch.example_en: I usually eat lunch with my friends at school every day.
lunch.example_zh: 我通常每天在學校和朋友一起吃午餐。

machine.example_en: The washing machine in our house is broken and needs repair.
machine.example_zh: 我們家的洗衣機壞了，需要修理。

mad.example_en: My mother was mad when she saw the broken vase.
mad.example_zh: 媽媽看到破損的花瓶時很生氣。

magazine.example_en: She reads fashion magazines every month to find new style ideas.
magazine.example_zh: 她每個月都看時尚雜誌，尋找新的造型靈感。

magic.example_en: The magician's magic performance amazed all the children at the party.
magic.example_zh: 魔術師的魔法表演讓派對上的所有小孩都驚嘆不已。

magician.example_en: The magician pulled a rabbit from his empty hat during the show.
magician.example_zh: 魔術師在表演中從空帽子裡變出了一隻兔子。

mail.example_en: I received an important package in the mail yesterday afternoon.
mail.example_zh: 我昨天下午收到了一個重要的郵包。

main.example_en: The main character in the movie is a brave and kind teacher.
main.example_zh: 這部電影的主角是一位勇敢善良的老師。

maintain.example_en: You should maintain good grades to get into a good university.
maintain.example_zh: 你應該保持良好的成績才能進入好的大學。

major.example_en: Pollution is a major problem affecting our environment and health.
major.example_zh: 污染是影響我們環境和健康的主要問題。

make.example_en: My sister makes delicious cookies every Saturday for the whole family.
make.example_zh: 我妹妹每個星期六都為全家做好吃的餅乾。

male.example_en: There are more female students than male students in our class.
male.example_zh: 我們班上女學生比男學生多。

mall.example_en: We usually go to the shopping mall to buy clothes on weekends.
mall.example_zh: 我們通常在週末去購物中心買衣服。

man.example_en: The old man sat on the bench and watched children playing.
man.example_zh: 那位老人坐在長椅上看著孩子們玩耍。

manager.example_en: The restaurant manager helped us find a quiet table for dinner.
manager.example_zh: 餐廳經理幫助我們找到了一個安靜的餐桌。

mango.example_en: The mango trees in the garden produce sweet fruit every summer.
mango.example_zh: 花園裡的芒果樹每年夏天都結甜蜜的果實。

manner.example_en: She always speaks in a polite manner to everyone she meets.
manner.example_zh: 她總是以禮貌的態度和她遇見的每個人交談。

many.example_en: There are many interesting museums in this city to visit.
many.example_zh: 這個城市有許多有趣的博物館值得參觀。

map.example_en: I used a map to find the correct way to the station.
map.example_zh: 我用地圖找到了到火車站的正確路線。

march.example_en: Thousands of people joined the march to support environmental protection.
march.example_zh: 數千人參加了這次遊行以支持環境保護。

mark.example_en: The coffee left a dark mark on the white tablecloth.
mark.example_zh: 咖啡在白桌布上留下了深色的痕跡。

market.example_en: Every Saturday morning, my family visits the farmers' market to buy fresh vegetables.
market.example_zh: 每個星期六早上，我的家人去農貿市場買新鮮蔬菜。

marriage.example_en: Their marriage has been happy and strong for twenty-five years.
marriage.example_zh: 他們的婚姻二十五年來一直幸福美滿。

married.example_en: My older sister got married last summer and moved to another city.
married.example_zh: 我的姐姐去年夏天結婚了，搬到了另一個城市。

marry.example_en: She decided to marry her university boyfriend after dating for five years.
marry.example_zh: 她決定與大學的男友結婚，他們已經交往了五年。

marvelous.example_en: The chef prepared a marvelous dessert that everyone at the party loved.
marvelous.example_zh: 主廚準備了一道絕妙的甜點，派對上的每個人都喜歡。

mask.example_en: During Halloween, children wear different masks and costumes to collect candy.
mask.example_zh: 在萬聖節，孩子們戴著不同的面具和戲服去要糖果。

mass.example_en: A mass of students gathered in the school courtyard for the morning assembly.
mass.example_zh: 大批學生聚集在學校的中庭進行早會。

master.example_en: The dog wagged its tail happily when it saw its master come home.
master.example_zh: 當狗看到它的主人回家時，開心地搖著尾巴。

mat.example_en: We took off our shoes and stepped on the yoga mat before stretching.
mat.example_zh: 我們脫掉鞋子，踩在瑜伽墊上開始伸展。

match.example_en: The basketball match between the two schools excited all the students.
match.example_zh: 兩所學校之間的籃球比賽讓所有學生都興奮不已。

mate.example_en: The swan stayed close to its mate while they swam across the lake.
mate.example_zh: 天鵝在湖上游泳時，總是靠近它的配偶。

material.example_en: The artist chose bright colors and soft material to make her sculpture.
material.example_zh: 藝術家選擇了鮮豔的顏色和柔軟的材料來製作她的雕塑。

matter.example_en: His parents didn't care about the matter, so he felt free to make his own choice.
matter.example_zh: 他的父母不在乎這件事，所以他可以自由地做出自己的選擇。

maximum.example_en: The maximum speed of the car is two hundred kilometers per hour.
maximum.example_zh: 這輛車的最高速度是每小時二百公里。

may.example_en: You may leave early today if your work is finished.
may.example_zh: 如果你的工作做完了，今天可以早點離開。

maybe.example_en: I'm not sure if I can go to the party; maybe I'll call you tomorrow.
maybe.example_zh: 我不確定能否去參加派對；也許我明天會打電話給你。

meal.example_en: My family always has our biggest meal together on Sunday evening.
meal.example_zh: 我的家人總是在星期天晚上一起享用最豐盛的一頓飯。

mean.example_en: What does that symbol mean on the map, and where are we going tomorrow?
mean.example_zh: 地圖上那個符號是什麼意思，我們明天去哪裡？

meaning.example_en: The student asked her teacher about the meaning of a difficult word in the poem.
meaning.example_zh: 學生問老師詩中一個難詞的意思。

measure.example_en: The teacher asked students to measure the length of the classroom with a ruler.
measure.example_zh: 老師要求學生用尺子測量教室的長度。

meat.example_en: My mother cooked beef and chicken meat for our family dinner.
meat.example_zh: 我媽媽為家人做了牛肉和雞肉當晚餐。

mechanic.example_en: The mechanic fixed my broken bicycle when the chain snapped.
mechanic.example_zh: 當我的自行車鏈條斷裂時，技師幫我修好了。

media.example_en: Social media platforms help people share news and photos every day.
media.example_zh: 社群媒體平台幫助人們每天分享新聞和照片。

medicine.example_en: She studied medicine at university for four years to become a doctor.
medicine.example_zh: 她在大學學了四年醫學才成為醫生。

medium.example_en: I usually buy a medium size coffee when I visit the café.
medium.example_zh: 我去咖啡館時通常買中杯咖啡。

meet.example_en: I met my best friend in primary school and we still talk today.
meet.example_zh: 我在小學時認識了最好的朋友，我們現在還有聯絡。

meeting.example_en: Our class held a meeting to choose where to go for the field trip.
meeting.example_zh: 我們班開了個會議來決定校外教學的地點。

member.example_en: She became a member of the swimming club this semester.
member.example_zh: 她這學期加入了游泳社，成為社團成員。

memory.example_en: My grandfather has a good memory and remembers many childhood events.
memory.example_zh: 我爺爺記憶力很好，還記得很多小時候發生的事。

menu.example_en: The restaurant menu showed many delicious options for dinner.
menu.example_zh: 餐廳的菜單上有很多美味的晚餐選擇。

message.example_en: I received a text message from my friend about tomorrow's party.
message.example_zh: 我收到朋友關於明天派對的簡訊。

metal.example_en: The bridge is made of strong metal to support thousands of cars.
metal.example_zh: 這座橋是用堅固的金屬建造的，可以支撐許多汽車。

meter.example_en: The gas meter on our building measures how much gas we use.
meter.example_zh: 我們建築物上的瓦斯表測量我們使用的瓦斯量。

method.example_en: The teacher uses an effective method to help students learn vocabulary.
method.example_zh: 老師使用一種有效的方法來幫助學生學習單字。

microwave.example_en: I put the leftover rice in the microwave to heat it quickly.
microwave.example_zh: 我把剩飯放進微波爐裡快速加熱。

middle.example_en: The middle chapter of the book contains the most exciting part.
middle.example_zh: 這本書中間的章節包含最令人興奮的部分。

midnight.example_en: The party lasted until midnight when all the guests finally left.
midnight.example_zh: 派對一直持續到午夜，所有客人才最後離開。

mile.example_en: The beach is about two miles away from our house.
mile.example_zh: 海灘距離我們家大約兩英里遠。

milk.example_en: Every morning I drink a glass of milk with my breakfast.
milk.example_zh: 每天早上我喝一杯牛奶配早餐。

million.example_en: Over a million people watched the concert on television last night.
million.example_zh: 超過一百萬人昨晚在電視上觀看了那場演唱會。

mind.example_en: Do you mind if I use your pen for a moment?
mind.example_zh: 你介意我借用你的筆一下嗎？

mine.example_en: This red notebook is mine, but that blue one belongs to your sister.
mine.example_zh: 這本紅色筆記本是我的，但那本藍色的是你妹妹的。

minor.example_en: He had only a minor injury after the accident, so he could still play basketball.
minor.example_zh: 車禍後他只有輕微的傷害，所以他仍然能夠打籃球。

minus.example_en: If we have ten apples minus three apples, we're left with seven.
minus.example_zh: 如果我們有十個蘋果減去三個蘋果，就剩下七個。

minute.example_en: Please wait a minute while I finish writing this message to you.
minute.example_zh: 請等一分鐘，我先完成給你的這則訊息。

mirror.example_en: She brushed her hair while looking at herself in the mirror every morning.
mirror.example_zh: 她每天早上邊看著鏡子裡的自己邊梳頭。

miss.example_en: I woke up too late and missed the bus to school yesterday.
miss.example_zh: 我昨天醒得太晚，錯過了去學校的公車。

mistake.example_en: Everyone makes mistakes, so don't feel bad about writing the wrong answer.
mistake.example_zh: 每個人都會犯錯，所以別為寫錯答案感到難過。

mix.example_en: My mom mixed flour and eggs together to make the cake batter.
mix.example_zh: 我媽媽把麵粉和雞蛋混在一起做蛋糕麵糊。

model.example_en: My older brother is a good model for how to study hard and stay healthy.
model.example_zh: 我哥哥是一個很好的榜樣，展示了如何努力學習並保持健康。

modern.example_en: The new school building has modern classrooms with computers and smart boards.
modern.example_zh: 新的學校建築有配備電腦和智慧黑板的現代化教室。

moment.example_en: Wait just a moment, and I'll get your book from my locker.
moment.example_zh: 等一下，我會從我的置物櫃拿你的書。

monday.example_en: We have a math test on Monday, so we should study all weekend.
monday.example_zh: 我們星期一有數學測驗，所以整個週末應該要讀書。

money.example_en: She saved money for two years to buy her first smartphone.
money.example_zh: 她存了兩年的錢才買到她的第一支智慧型手機。

monkey.example_en: The monkey at the zoo threw a banana peel at the glass window.
monkey.example_zh: 動物園裡的猴子把香蕉皮丟向玻璃窗。

monster.example_en: The little boy wasn't afraid of monsters under his bed anymore.
monster.example_zh: 小男孩不再害怕床底下的怪物了。

month.example_en: I haven't seen my grandmother for a month because she lives far away.
month.example_zh: 我已經一個月沒有見到我的祖母了，因為她住得很遠。

moon.example_en: On clear nights, you can see the moon shining brightly in the sky.
moon.example_zh: 在晴朗的夜晚，你可以看到月亮在天空中閃閃發光。

mop.example_en: My dad used a mop to clean the kitchen floor after dinner.
mop.example_zh: 我爸爸在晚餐後用拖把清潔廚房地板。

more.example_en: She wants more chocolate than her brother does.
more.example_zh: 她想要比她哥哥更多的巧克力。

morning.example_en: I usually drink tea in the morning before going to school.
morning.example_zh: 我通常在上學前的早上喝茶。

mosquito.example_en: A mosquito bit my arm last night and left a red mark.
mosquito.example_zh: 昨晚一隻蚊子叮了我的手臂，留下了紅色的痕跡。

most.example_en: She has the most friends in our entire class right now.
most.example_zh: 她是我們整個班級中朋友最多的人。

mother.example_en: My mother always helps me with my homework after school every day.
mother.example_zh: 我的媽媽每天放學後都幫我寫功課。

motion.example_en: The teacher asked the students to stop making unnecessary motion in class.
motion.example_zh: 老師要求學生在課堂上停止不必要的動作。

motorcycle.example_en: He rides his motorcycle to work every morning very carefully.
motorcycle.example_zh: 他每天早上都很小心地騎著他的機車去上班。

mountain.example_en: The mountain was very high, so climbing took almost three days total.
mountain.example_zh: 這座山很高，所以爬山總共花了將近三天的時間。

mouse.example_en: You need to click the mouse button to select files on your computer.
mouse.example_zh: 你需要點擊滑鼠按鈕來選擇電腦上的檔案。

mouth.example_en: Please cover your mouth when you cough to avoid spreading germs around.
mouth.example_zh: 咳嗽時請用手掩住你的嘴，以避免傳播細菌。

move.example_en: Can you move that heavy table to the corner of the room?
move.example_zh: 你能把那張重桌子移到房間的角落嗎？

movement.example_en: The dancer's smooth movement across the stage impressed everyone in the theater.
movement.example_zh: 舞者在舞台上流暢的動作給劇院裡的每個人留下了深刻印象。

movie.example_en: We watched a really funny movie at home together last Saturday evening.
movie.example_zh: 上週六晚上我們在家一起看了一部非常有趣的電影。

mud.example_en: After the heavy rain, the soccer field was covered in thick mud completely.
mud.example_zh: 大雨過後，足球場被厚厚的泥土完全覆蓋了。

mug.example_en: She fills her favorite mug with hot coffee every morning at breakfast.
mug.example_zh: 她每天早餐時都用她最喜歡的馬克杯裝滿熱咖啡。

museum.example_en: We visited the natural history museum and saw ancient dinosaur fossils yesterday.
museum.example_zh: 我們昨天參觀了自然歷史博物館，看到了古老的恐龍化石。

music.example_en: She listens to classical music while doing homework to help her focus.
music.example_zh: 她在做功課時聽古典音樂來幫助集中注意力。

musician.example_en: The musician played beautiful piano pieces at the concert last evening perfectly.
musician.example_zh: 那位音樂家在昨晚的音樂會上完美地彈奏了美妙的鋼琴曲。

must.example_en: If you want good grades, you must study hard and practice regularly.
must.example_zh: 如果你想要好成績，你必須努力學習並定期練習。

nail.example_en: He used a hammer to drive the nail into the wooden board.
nail.example_zh: 他用鎚子把釘子釘進木板裡。

name.example_en: My sister's name is Emma, and she loves painting.
name.example_zh: 我姐姐的名字是艾瑪，她喜歡畫畫。

napkin.example_en: Please use a napkin to wipe your mouth after eating.
napkin.example_zh: 吃完飯後請用餐巾擦拭你的嘴巴。

narrow.example_en: The narrow path between the buildings made it hard to walk.
narrow.example_zh: 建築物之間狹窄的小路使得很難行走。

nation.example_en: Japan is an island nation in East Asia with beautiful traditions.
nation.example_zh: 日本是位於東亞的島國，擁有美麗的傳統。

national.example_en: The national flag represents the pride of an entire country.
national.example_zh: 國旗代表了整個國家的驕傲。

natural.example_en: This juice contains natural fruit flavors without any chemical additives.
natural.example_zh: 這款果汁含有天然水果風味，不含任何化學添加物。

nature.example_en: In summer, my family enjoys hiking in nature on weekends.
nature.example_zh: 夏天時，我的家人喜歡在週末去大自然中登山。

naughty.example_en: The naughty child kept laughing while running around the classroom.
naughty.example_zh: 那個調皮的孩子在教室裡跑來跑去，不停地笑。

near.example_en: There is a bakery near our school where we buy bread.
near.example_zh: 我們學校附近有一家麵包店，我們在那裡買麵包。

nearly.example_en: The concert was so exciting that I nearly fell off my seat.
nearly.example_zh: 這場演唱會太令人興奮，我差點從座位上摔下來。

necessary.example_en: Wearing a helmet is necessary when you ride your bicycle to school.
necessary.example_zh: 騎腳踏車上學時戴安全帽是必需的。

neck.example_en: She wore a beautiful scarf around her neck at the party.
neck.example_zh: 她在派對上在脖子上圍著一條漂亮的圍巾。

necklace.example_en: My grandmother gave me her gold necklace as a birthday present.
necklace.example_zh: 我的祖母把她的黃金項鏈作為生日禮物送給我。

need.example_en: We need to finish our homework before we can play video games.
need.example_zh: 我們必須先完成功課，才能玩電動遊戲。

needle.example_en: My grandmother used a needle and thread to repair my torn shirt.
needle.example_zh: 我的祖母用針和線修補了我撕裂的襯衫。

negative.example_en: Having a negative attitude makes it harder to solve difficult problems.
negative.example_zh: 持有消極態度會讓解決困難的問題變得更加困難。

neighbor.example_en: Our neighbor grows fresh vegetables in her garden every summer.
neighbor.example_zh: 我們的鄰居每年夏天都在她的花園裡種植新鮮蔬菜。

neither.example_en: Neither of my brothers enjoys horror movies as much as I do.
neither.example_zh: 我的兩個哥哥都沒有我那麼喜歡恐怖電影。

nephew.example_en: My nephew loves playing basketball with his friends at the park.
nephew.example_zh: 我的侄子喜歡和他的朋友在公園裡一起打籃球。

nervous.example_en: Many students feel nervous before taking an important exam at school.
nervous.example_zh: 許多學生在學校參加重要考試前感到緊張不安。

nest.example_en: The bird built a nest in the tall tree above our garden.
nest.example_zh: 鳥在我們花園上方的大樹上築了一個窩。

never.example_en: I have never tried sushi before, so I'm excited to eat it today.
never.example_zh: 我從未吃過壽司，所以我今天很期待品嚐它。

new.example_en: She bought a new backpack for her first day of high school.
new.example_zh: 她為高中第一天買了一個新背包。

news.example_en: Did you hear the news that our school won the basketball championship?
news.example_zh: 你聽說我們學校贏得籃球冠軍的消息了嗎？

newspaper.example_en: My grandfather reads the newspaper every morning with his coffee.
newspaper.example_zh: 我祖父每天早上喝著咖啡讀報紙。

next.example_en: The next train to Taipei leaves in ten minutes from platform three.
next.example_zh: 下一班往台北的火車在十分鐘後從3號月台發車。

nice.example_en: We had a nice dinner at the restaurant on Saturday evening.
nice.example_zh: 我們週六晚上在餐廳享用了一頓美好的晚餐。

niece.example_en: My niece is five years old and loves playing with her toy dolls.
niece.example_zh: 我的侄女五歲了，喜歡玩她的玩具娃娃。

night.example_en: Last night we saw a beautiful full moon in the clear sky.
night.example_zh: 昨晚我們在晴朗的天空中看到了美麗的滿月。

nine.example_en: My sister turned nine years old on her birthday last month.
nine.example_zh: 我妹妹上個月生日時滿九歲了。

nineteen.example_en: He is nineteen years old and just started studying at university.
nineteen.example_zh: 他十九歲，剛開始在大學裡讀書。

ninety.example_en: The old man is ninety years old but still very active and healthy.
ninety.example_zh: 這位老人已經九十歲了，但仍然非常活躍和健康。

no.example_en: No, thank you. I'm not hungry right now.

nod.example_en: When the teacher asked if everyone understood, we all nodded.
nod.example_zh: 當老師問大家是否都懂了時，我們都點了頭。

noise.example_en: The loud noise from the construction site disturbed our class this morning.
noise.example_zh: 建築工地的巨大噪音今早打擾了我們的課堂。

noisy.example_en: The cafeteria gets very noisy when all the students eat lunch together.
noisy.example_zh: 所有學生一起吃午餐時，食堂變得非常喧鬧。

none.example_en: I asked if anyone wanted to join my team, but none were interested.
none.example_zh: 我問有沒有人想加入我的隊伍，但他們都沒有興趣。

noodle.example_en: I love eating noodles for dinner, especially when they are hot and spicy.
noodle.example_zh: 我喜歡吃麵條當晚餐，尤其是熱辣的麵條。

noon.example_en: We usually have lunch at noon and then return to class.
noon.example_zh: 我們通常在中午吃午飯，然後回到教室。

nor.example_en: He likes neither chocolate nor vanilla ice cream, only strawberry.
nor.example_zh: 他既不喜歡巧克力冰淇淋也不喜歡香草冰淇淋，只喜歡草莓的。

north.example_en: We drove north for three hours and reached the mountains.
north.example_zh: 我們向北開了三小時，到達了山區。

nose.example_en: His nose was cold from playing outside in the winter wind.
nose.example_zh: 他在冬風中在外面玩耍，鼻子凍得很冷。

not.example_en: The restaurant is not open on Mondays, so we went on Tuesday instead.
not.example_zh: 那家餐廳星期一不營業，所以我們改在星期二去。

note.example_en: She left a note on the table explaining where she was going.
note.example_zh: 她在桌子上留下便條，說明她要去哪裡。

notebook.example_en: My notebook was filled with vocabulary words from English class.
notebook.example_zh: 我的筆記本裡滿是英文課的單字。

nothing.example_en: The fridge was empty; there was nothing to eat for dinner.
nothing.example_zh: 冰箱是空的；晚餐沒有東西吃。

notice.example_en: I noticed that she was wearing a new jacket today.
notice.example_zh: 我注意到她今天穿了一件新夾克。

novel.example_en: She spent the whole weekend reading a mystery novel.
novel.example_zh: 她整個週末都在讀一部推理小說。

november.example_en: November is when my family celebrates Thanksgiving together.
november.example_zh: 十一月是我的家人一起慶祝感恩節的時候。

now.example_en: The bus is arriving now, so we need to get on quickly.
now.example_zh: 公車現在要到了，所以我們要快點上車。

number.example_en: Can you write down the phone number before you forget it?
number.example_zh: 你能在忘記之前寫下電話號碼嗎？

nurse.example_en: The nurse checked my blood pressure and temperature at the clinic.
nurse.example_zh: 護士在診所檢查了我的血壓和體溫。

nut.example_en: I have a peanut allergy, so I cannot eat that nut.
nut.example_zh: 我對花生過敏，所以我不能吃那個堅果。

obey.example_en: The dog obeys his owner's commands because they practice together every day.
obey.example_zh: 狗狗服從主人的命令，因為他們每天都一起練習。

object.example_en: The archaeologist carefully examined the ancient object under bright light.
object.example_zh: 考古學家在強光下仔細檢查了古老的物體。

ocean.example_en: We spent two weeks swimming and surfing at the ocean last summer.
ocean.example_zh: 去年夏天我們在海洋裡游泳和衝浪，待了兩週。

october.example_en: October is perfect for hiking because the weather is cool and dry.
october.example_zh: 十月很適合登山，因為天氣涼爽乾燥。

of.example_en: The color of the sky changes from blue to orange during sunset.
of.example_zh: 天空的顏色在日落時從藍色變成橙色。

off.example_en: We drove off the main road and found a small village in the forest.
off.example_zh: 我們駛離主幹道，在森林裡發現了一個小村莊。

offer.example_en: The company offered her a higher salary to keep her as an employee.
offer.example_zh: 公司提高薪水，希望她留下來工作。

office.example_en: My father works in an office building downtown.
office.example_zh: 我爸爸在市中心的辦公樓工作。

officer.example_en: The police officer helped the lost child find her home.
officer.example_zh: 警察幫助迷路的小孩找到家。

often.example_en: Sarah often goes to the library to study after school.
often.example_zh: 莎拉放學後經常去圖書館讀書。

oil.example_en: Many countries produce oil from deep underground reserves.
oil.example_zh: 許多國家從地下深處開採石油。

okay.example_en: Your plan is okay, but we need to add more details.
okay.example_zh: 你的計畫還可以，但我們需要加入更多細節。

old.example_en: My grandmother told us stories about her old school days.
old.example_zh: 我奶奶向我們講述她年輕時的學校故事。

omit.example_en: Please do not omit any important information from your report.
omit.example_zh: 請不要在報告中遺漏任何重要資訊。

on.example_en: The cat jumped on the table and knocked over the vase.
on.example_zh: 貓跳上桌子，打翻了花瓶。

once.example_en: I have visited Japan once, and I loved it very much.
once.example_zh: 我去過日本一次，我非常喜歡那裡。

one.example_en: One student in our class won first prize in the competition.
one.example_zh: 我們班有一個學生在比賽中贏得第一名。

onion.example_en: My mom is chopping onion in the kitchen for dinner.
onion.example_zh: 我媽媽在廚房切洋蔥做晚餐。

only.example_en: The only problem with this phone is its high price.
only.example_zh: 這支手機唯一的問題是價格太貴。

open.example_en: The shop opens at nine o'clock every morning.
open.example_zh: 這家店每天早上九點開門。

operate.example_en: This machine operates smoothly once we turn on the power switch.
operate.example_zh: 我們打開電源開關後，這台機器就能順利運作。

opinion.example_en: Everyone has different opinions about which movie is the best.
opinion.example_zh: 每個人對於最好的電影都有不同的看法。

or.example_en: Would you like apple juice or orange juice with lunch?
or.example_zh: 午餐時你想要蘋果汁還是柳橙汁？

orange.example_en: My little sister eats one orange every day after school.
orange.example_zh: 我妹妹每天放學後都吃一顆柳橙。

order.example_en: I made an order for a birthday cake at the bakery.
order.example_zh: 我在麵包店訂購了一個生日蛋糕。

ordinary.example_en: It was just an ordinary Tuesday afternoon until something exciting happened.
ordinary.example_zh: 那只是個普通的星期二下午，直到發生了令人興奮的事。

organ.example_en: The heart is the most important organ in your body.
organ.example_zh: 心臟是身體中最重要的器官。

organization.example_en: The school's sports organization helps students join different clubs.
organization.example_zh: 學校的運動組織幫助學生加入各種社團。

other.example_en: My sister likes this book, but I prefer the other one on the shelf.
other.example_zh: 我妹妹喜歡這本書，但我更喜歡書架上那本。

out.example_en: When the weather is nice, we go out to play in the park.
out.example_zh: 天氣好的時候，我們會出去公園玩。

outside.example_en: The children are playing outside while their parents watch from the door.
outside.example_zh: 孩子們在外面玩耍，父母從門口看著他們。

oven.example_en: My mother uses the oven to bake a delicious cake for my birthday.
oven.example_zh: 我媽媽用烤箱為我生日烤一個美味的蛋糕。

over.example_en: There is a bridge over the river that connects the two villages.
over.example_zh: 河上有一座橋，連接了兩個村莊。

overseas.example_en: My uncle works overseas and only visits us during the summer holidays.
overseas.example_zh: 我叔叔在海外工作，只在暑假時來看我們。

own.example_en: When you turn eighteen, you can own a house and make your own decisions.
own.example_zh: 當你滿十八歲時，你可以擁有房子並做自己的決定。

owner.example_en: The restaurant owner opens the shop every morning at seven o'clock.
owner.example_zh: 餐廳老闆每天早上七點開店。

ox.example_en: The farmer uses an ox to help him plow the fields during planting season.
ox.example_zh: 農民在播種季節用公牛幫助他耕田。

pack.example_en: Before our trip tomorrow, we need to pack our bags with clothes and books.
pack.example_zh: 在明天的旅行前，我們需要收拾行李放入衣服和書。

package.example_en: A package arrived at our house, and my little sister was excited to open it.
package.example_zh: 一個包裹送到了我們家，我妹妹很興奮想打開它。

page.example_en: I finished reading the first page of the novel before going to bed last night.
page.example_zh: 昨晚睡前我讀完了小說的第一頁。

pain.example_en: After playing football for two hours, my legs felt pain and I had to rest.
pain.example_zh: 踢了兩小時足球後，我的腿感到疼痛，必須休息。

painful.example_en: The dentist said extracting the tooth would be painful, so he gave me medicine first.
painful.example_zh: 牙醫說拔牙會很痛苦，所以他先給了我藥。

paint.example_en: We paint the bedroom walls with light blue color to make it feel calm.
paint.example_zh: 我們把臥室的牆壁塗成淡藍色，讓人感到平靜。

painter.example_en: The famous painter spent ten years creating this beautiful artwork for the museum.
painter.example_zh: 這位著名畫家花了十年時間為博物館創作這件美麗的藝術品。

pair.example_en: I found a pair of socks under my bed that I lost three months ago.
pair.example_zh: 我在床下找到了三個月前失去的一雙襪子。

pajamas.example_en: My brother wears comfortable pajamas to sleep every night after school.
pajamas.example_zh: 我哥哥每天放學後穿舒適的睡衣睡覺。

pale.example_en: When my friend heard the bad news, her face turned pale and she looked worried.
pale.example_zh: 當我朋友聽到壞消息時，她的臉變得蒼白，看起來很擔心。

pan.example_en: She heated the pan on the stove before adding the eggs.
pan.example_zh: 她在爐子上加熱平底鍋，然後加入雞蛋。

panda.example_en: The giant panda ate bamboo leaves all day long in the zoo.
panda.example_zh: 大熊貓在動物園裡整天吃竹葉。

pants.example_en: He packed an extra pair of pants in his gym bag.
pants.example_zh: 他在健身包裡放了一條多餘的內褲。

papaya.example_en: The papaya tree in our garden produces sweet fruit every summer.
papaya.example_zh: 我們花園裡的番木瓜樹每個夏天都結甜果。

paper.example_en: My grandfather reads the paper with his coffee every morning.
paper.example_zh: 我的祖父每天早上邊喝咖啡邊看報紙。

pardon.example_en: The king granted pardon to the criminal who had changed his ways.
pardon.example_zh: 國王原諒了改邪歸正的犯人。

parent.example_en: My parent always encourages me to work hard and follow my dreams.
parent.example_zh: 我的父母親總是鼓勵我努力工作，追求夢想。

park.example_en: We played basketball in the park after school with our friends.
park.example_zh: 放學後我們在公園和朋友們打籃球。

parrot.example_en: The colorful parrot repeated everything we said with a funny voice.
parrot.example_zh: 那隻彩色的鸚鵡用有趣的聲音重複我們說的一切。

part.example_en: The best part of the movie was the exciting final scene.
part.example_zh: 電影最好看的部分是最後那個驚險的場景。

particular.example_en: That particular restaurant is always crowded because the food tastes amazing.
particular.example_zh: 那家特定的餐廳總是很擁擠，因為食物非常美味。

partner.example_en: My partner and I worked together on the science project all week.
partner.example_zh: 我和我的搭檔整週一起做科學專案。

party.example_en: We went to his birthday party and danced all night long.
party.example_zh: 我們去了他的生日派對，整晚都在跳舞。

pass.example_en: I pass the library on my way to school every single day.
pass.example_zh: 我每天上學的路上都要經過圖書館。

passenger.example_en: The passenger asked the flight attendant for a pillow and blanket.
passenger.example_zh: 乘客問空姐要了一個枕頭和毯子。

past.example_en: In the past few weeks, I have read five interesting books.
past.example_zh: 在過去的幾週，我讀了五本有趣的書。

paste.example_en: We used glue paste to stick the photos into the scrapbook carefully.
paste.example_zh: 我們用膠糊小心地把照片貼在剪貼簿裡。

path.example_en: The narrow path through the forest led us directly to the lake.
path.example_zh: 穿過森林的狹窄小道直接通向湖邊。

patient.example_en: The kind doctor treated each patient with care and respect.
patient.example_zh: 親切的醫生用心和尊重對待每位患者。

pattern.example_en: The checkered pattern on the tablecloth looked very modern and stylish.
pattern.example_zh: 桌布上的方格圖案看起來非常現代和時尚。

pause.example_en: The player took a pause and drank some water before the game continued.
pause.example_zh: 球員暫停了一會兒，喝了水後比賽才繼續進行。

pay.example_en: You need to pay for your lunch when you finish eating at the cafeteria.
pay.example_zh: 你吃完午餐後需要在食堂付錢。

peace.example_en: After the two countries signed the agreement, peace finally returned to the region.
peace.example_zh: 兩個國家簽署協議後，該地區終於恢復了和平。

peaceful.example_en: The small village was very peaceful, with no noise except bird songs in the morning.
peaceful.example_zh: 這個小村莊很寧靜，除了早晨的鳥鳴聲，沒有其他噪音。

peach.example_en: The juicy peach was sweet and delicious, perfect for a hot summer afternoon.
peach.example_zh: 多汁的桃子又甜又好吃，非常適合炎熱的夏日午後享受。

peanut.example_en: The bag of peanuts was so crunchy and salty that I could not stop eating.
peanut.example_zh: 這包花生又脆又鹹，我停不下來。

pear.example_en: My grandmother gave me a sweet yellow pear from her garden yesterday morning.
pear.example_zh: 昨天早上奶奶給了我她花園裡的甜黃梨。

pen.example_en: I forgot my pen in class, so I borrowed one from my friend to write notes.
pen.example_zh: 我把筆忘在教室裡了，所以向朋友借了一支來做筆記。

pencil.example_en: The student sharpened the dull pencil so she could continue drawing her art project.
pencil.example_zh: 學生削尖了鈍鉛筆，這樣她可以繼續她的美術作業。

people.example_en: Many people gathered in the park to watch the beautiful sunset together that evening.
people.example_zh: 許多人聚集在公園裡一起欣賞那個晚上美麗的夕陽。

pepper.example_en: The cook added a little pepper to the soup to make it taste more interesting.
pepper.example_zh: 廚師在湯裡加了一點胡椒粉，讓味道更有趣。

perfect.example_en: The dancer's perfect performance left the audience speechless and wanting more encores.
perfect.example_zh: 舞者完美的表演讓觀眾啞口無言，想要更多次的加演。

perhaps.example_en: Perhaps you should study more tonight if you want to pass the test tomorrow.
perhaps.example_zh: 如果你想明天通過考試，或許今晚應該多讀書。

period.example_en: During the period of three months, the team trained hard for the regional championship.
period.example_zh: 在三個月的時間內，隊伍為了區域賽而努力訓練。

personal.example_en: She did not want to share her personal diary with anyone at the school.
personal.example_zh: 她不想和學校裡的任何人分享她的個人日記。

pet.example_en: My little sister feeds her pet rabbit fresh vegetables every morning without fail.
pet.example_zh: 我妹妹每天早上都毫不例外地餵她的寵物兔子新鮮蔬菜。

photo.example_en: I took a beautiful photo of the sunset and shared it on social media.
photo.example_zh: 我拍了一張漂亮的日落照片，並在社群媒體上分享了。

physics.example_en: He studied physics hard all year because he wanted to enter a top university.
physics.example_zh: 他整年都認真學習物理，因為他想進入頂尖大學。

piano.example_en: Every afternoon, the girl practiced piano in the music room for two hours.
piano.example_zh: 每個下午，女孩在音樂教室裡練習鋼琴兩個小時。

pick.example_en: I went to the bookstore and picked three interesting books to read this summer.
pick.example_zh: 我去書店挑選了三本有趣的書在這個暑假讀。

picnic.example_en: We packed sandwiches and brought them to the park for our picnic.
picnic.example_zh: 我們準備了三明治，帶到公園去野餐。

picture.example_en: Can you draw a picture of your favorite animal on this paper?
picture.example_zh: 你能在這張紙上畫出你最喜歡的動物嗎？

pie.example_en: Mom baked an apple pie for dessert after our dinner yesterday.
pie.example_zh: 媽媽昨天晚餐後烤了一個蘋果派當甜點。

piece.example_en: She broke the chocolate bar into small pieces and shared with friends.
piece.example_zh: 她把巧克力棒分成小塊，和朋友們分享。

pig.example_en: He never shares anything with us, so we think he is a real pig.
pig.example_zh: 他從不和我們分享任何東西，所以我們認為他是個難相處的人。

pigeon.example_en: The pigeon landed on the windowsill and ate the breadcrumbs I left.
pigeon.example_zh: 鴿子停在窗台上，吃掉我留下的麵包屑。

pile.example_en: There was a huge pile of dirty clothes on my bedroom floor.
pile.example_zh: 我房間的地板上有一大堆髒衣服。

pillow.example_en: I rest my head on my soft pillow every night before I sleep.
pillow.example_zh: 我每晚睡覺前都把頭放在柔軟的枕頭上。

pin.example_en: She used a pin to attach the poster to the wall safely.
pin.example_zh: 她用別針把海報牢固地固定在牆上。

pineapple.example_en: The juice from the pineapple was sweet and refreshing on hot days.
pineapple.example_zh: 鳳梨果汁在炎熱的日子裡既香甜又清爽。

pink.example_en: Sarah wore a pink dress to the school dance last weekend.
pink.example_zh: 莎拉上週末穿著粉紅色洋裝去參加學校舞會。

pipe.example_en: The water comes from the underground pipe that runs beneath our street.
pipe.example_zh: 水來自於在我們街道下方的地下管道。

pizza.example_en: We ordered a large pizza with cheese and pepperoni for our party.
pizza.example_zh: 我們為派對訂購了一個起司和辣椒披薩。

place.example_en: The library is a quiet place where students go to study.
place.example_zh: 圖書館是學生去學習的安靜場所。

plain.example_en: She prefers plain clothes without any fancy patterns or bright colors.
plain.example_zh: 她喜歡沒有花紋或亮色的樸素衣服。

plan.example_en: We made a plan to visit the museum next Saturday morning.
plan.example_zh: 我們計劃下週六早上去參觀博物館。

planet.example_en: Earth is the planet where we live and we must protect it.
planet.example_zh: 地球是我們生活的星球，我們必須保護它。

plant.example_en: I water the plant on my desk every morning to keep it healthy.
plant.example_zh: 我每天早上給我桌上的植物澆水，讓它保持健康。

plate.example_en: Mom put the hot food on a ceramic plate for dinner.
plate.example_zh: 媽媽把熱菜放在陶瓷盤子裡當晚餐。

platform.example_en: The train arrived at the platform and all passengers got on board.
platform.example_zh: 火車到達月台，所有乘客都上了車。

play.example_en: The children play together in the park every afternoon after school.
play.example_zh: 孩子們每天放學後在公園裡一起玩耍。

player.example_en: The football player scored three goals in the match yesterday.
player.example_zh: 那位足球運動員在昨天的比賽中進了三球。

playground.example_en: My little brother loves to run around the playground during recess time.
playground.example_zh: 我弟弟喜歡在下課時間在操場上跑來跑去。

pleasant.example_en: The weather was pleasant so we decided to have lunch outside.
pleasant.example_zh: 天氣宜人，所以我們決定在外面吃午餐。

please.example_en: Could you please pass me the salt from that table over there?
please.example_zh: 你能幫我遞一下那邊桌上的鹽嗎？

plus.example_en: Five plus three equals eight in mathematics class today.
plus.example_zh: 五加三等於八，這是今天數學課的內容。

pocket.example_en: I found ten dollars in the pocket of my old jacket yesterday.
pocket.example_zh: 我昨天在舊夾克的口袋裡發現了十塊錢。

poem.example_en: She wrote a beautiful poem about the mountains for her homework.
poem.example_zh: 她為了功課寫了一首關於山的美麗詩歌。

poet.example_en: The famous poet gave a reading of her new work at the library.
poet.example_zh: 那位著名詩人在圖書館朗誦了她的新作品。

point.example_en: Tom pointed at the building and asked his friend what it was.
point.example_zh: 湯姆指著那棟建築物，問他的朋友那是什麼。

poison.example_en: The scientist warned us that some mushrooms contain poison and are dangerous.
poison.example_zh: 科學家警告我們某些蘑菇含有毒素，很危險。

police.example_en: The police arrived quickly and helped the lost child find her mother.
police.example_zh: 警方很快趕到，幫助那個迷路的小女孩找到了媽媽。

polite.example_en: It is polite to say thank you when someone gives you a gift.
polite.example_zh: 當有人送你禮物時，說謝謝是有禮貌的舉動。

pollute.example_en: Too many cars pollute the air in big cities every single day.
pollute.example_zh: 太多汽車每天污染大城市的空氣。

pollution.example_en: Air pollution is a serious problem that affects everyone's health today.
pollution.example_zh: 空氣污染是一個嚴重的問題，影響著每個人的健康。

pond.example_en: The ducks swim and play in the small pond behind our school.
pond.example_zh: 鴨子們在我們學校後面的小池塘裡遊泳和玩耍。

pool.example_en: We went swimming at the public pool on a hot summer afternoon.
pool.example_zh: 在炎熱的夏日午後，我們在公共游泳池游泳。

poor.example_en: The poor family received help from the community to buy new clothes.
poor.example_zh: 那個貧困的家庭從社區獲得幫助購買新衣服。

popcorn.example_en: We shared a big bucket of popcorn while watching the movie together.
popcorn.example_zh: 我們看電影時一起分享了一大桶爆玉米花。

popular.example_en: That singer is very popular among teenagers and has many young fans.
popular.example_zh: 那位歌手在青少年中非常受歡迎，有許多年輕粉絲。

population.example_en: The population of Taiwan has been stable over the last decade.
population.example_zh: 台灣的人口在過去十年裡保持穩定。

pork.example_en: My mother cooked delicious pork for dinner last night.
pork.example_zh: 我媽媽昨晚煮了美味的豬肉當晚餐。

port.example_en: The fishing boats returned to the port early in the morning.
port.example_zh: 漁船一大早就返回港口。

pose.example_en: Climate change poses serious challenges to agriculture worldwide.
pose.example_zh: 氣候變化對全球農業造成了嚴峻的挑戰。

position.example_en: The teacher asked us to mark the position of each city on the map.
position.example_zh: 老師要求我們在地圖上標記每座城市的位置。

positive.example_en: Despite the failure, she remained positive and tried again.
positive.example_zh: 儘管失敗了，她仍然保持積極態度並再次嘗試。

possible.example_en: It is possible to learn a new language if you study consistently.
possible.example_zh: 如果你持續學習，就有可能學會一種新語言。

post.example_en: I sent the letter by post to my friend in London.
post.example_zh: 我通過郵件把信寄給了倫敦的朋友。

pot.example_en: She boiled water in the pot and made tea for everyone.
pot.example_zh: 她在壺裡燒水，為大家泡茶。

potato.example_en: She peeled the potato and cut it into small pieces.
potato.example_zh: 她削去馬鈴薯的皮，把它切成小塊。

pound.example_en: The expensive jacket in the store cost one hundred pounds.
pound.example_zh: 這件昂貴的夾克在店裡要一百英鎊。

powder.example_en: My grandmother added powder to the cake mixture before baking.
powder.example_zh: 我奶奶在烘焙前把粉末加入蛋糕混合物中。

power.example_en: The strongest nations in the world have great power over smaller countries.
power.example_zh: 世界上最強的國家對較小的國家有很大的影響力。

practice.example_en: Regular practice makes you better at playing the piano.
practice.example_zh: 定期練習讓你在彈鋼琴方面變得更好。

praise.example_en: The teacher gave praise to the students for their excellent work.
praise.example_zh: 老師讚揚了學生們優秀的作業。

pray.example_en: Many people pray before eating meals in their daily life.
pray.example_zh: 許多人在日常生活中吃飯前禱告。

precious.example_en: The old photograph is precious because it shows her family long ago.
precious.example_zh: 這張舊照片很珍貴，因為它顯示了她很久前的家人。

prefer.example_en: My sister prefers eating fruit to eating candy.
prefer.example_zh: 我妹妹寧可吃水果也不吃糖果。

prepare.example_en: We must prepare our lessons before the examination begins next month.
prepare.example_zh: 我們必須在下個月考試開始前準備課程。
